items.name_en: !!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag in black patent leather. Black patent leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, interior: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, handle (18cm high), detachable webbed shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
items.name_cn:
!!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag in black patent leather. Black patent leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, interior: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, handle (18cm high), detachable webbed shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
Model: 782849.
Dimensions: 27.5(W) x 19(H) x 4cm(D)
Color: Black patent leather / Original leather.
Made in Italy
Model height: 176cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, long wallet, and lipstick

items.name_en: !!️【Complete Original Packaging】!!️MiuMiu New Mini Bowling Bag, this Arcadie leather mini handbag conveys a fashion philosophy of transforming reflections on current reality into a unique silhouette. The soft design makes the bag look fuller, showcasing a metropolitan style. The tonal letter logo adds a unique beauty and classic touch. Detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, cotton satin lining with card slot.

items.name_en: !!️【Complete Original Packaging】!!️MiuMiu New Mini MiuWander Handbag, featuring imported lambskin with classic brand signature Matelasse embroidery, vintage matte hardware. Utilizing curved lines, it retains a playful feel. The structured shape is full of personality, sweet yet chic, and spacious. Fashion influencers almost all own one.

This Gucci Horsebit 1955 series chain wallet is presented in beige and dark brown, cleverly incorporating elegant Gucci AnacRed leather trim.

items.name_en: !!️【With full original green box packaging】!!️GG Marmont series quilted mini bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's constantly evolving aesthetic philosophy. As a highlight of the 2023 Spring/Summer collection, the leatherware is presented in a delicate light pink, a refined and elegant tone announcing the new season. On this GG Marmont series mini bag, it is presented with a dazzling touch, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Light pink V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining double G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate internal compartments, zip coin purse, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high) snap closure.
